speaker: speaker1
text: Good evening , Saliva . What's that wonderful aroma from your kitchen ? What are you doing now ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I have studied its skills recently at a training school . I plan to run a restaurant , so I have to practise cooking !

speaker: speaker1
text: It is a good idea . What dish are you cooking now ? !

speaker: speaker2
text: I am steaming fish in a pressure cooker . Have you ever tried steamed fish ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , I have . But the taste of steamed fish at that restaurant is not delicious . The fish is not well-done and too salty .

speaker: speaker2
text: That's the case . I think there is not enough time to steam it and soy sauce is too much .

speaker: speaker1
text: I have the same idea as yours .

speaker: speaker2
text: It's OK . Please have a taste of it .

speaker: speaker1
text: Thank you . Oh , it's very delicious .

speaker: speaker1
text: Besides steamed fish , what else are you good at cooking ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I am good at stewing beef with potato , frying chicken , hot and sour soup etc .

speaker: speaker1
text: So many dishes . Next Friday week is my birthday . I would like to invite you to cook for my dinner party , OK ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Why not ? It is a good opportunity for me to practise cooking .
